# Marathon Training Framework

## Phases

| Phase | Weeks | Focus | Long run |
|---|---|---|---|
| Base | 1–4 | Aerobic base, consistency | up to 18–20 km |
| Build | 5–12 | Volume + intensity | 20–35+ km |
| Taper | 13–16 | Recover, maintain sharpness | 20–25 km → shorter |

## Default weekly structure (4 runs/week)

Mon: Easy · Tue: Quality · Wed: Easy · Thu: Quality or Easy · Fri: Rest · **Sat: Long run** · Sun: Rest

## Volume guidelines

- Peak: 50–70 km/week (varies by experience)
- Down week every 3–4 weeks: reduce 30–40%
- Never increase weekly volume >10% week-to-week
- 48–72 h between quality sessions

## Customisation

Adjust day distribution for athlete schedule. Shift long run day if needed. Scale volume and taper to athlete fitness signals.
